programme.desc: Seattle Grace Hospital springs into action to save the lives of two young girls whose powerful story will force some of the doctors to revisit the effects of bullying on their own pasts. Meanwhile, Meredith adapts to new living arrangements.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Walking Tall
programme.desc: The pressure is on as a determined Bailey tackles her first day as Chief; meanwhile, April's marriage is in jeopardy and she finds herself unable to address her problems. Meredith struggles to juggle all her responsibilities.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Choose You
programme.desc: Maggie re-evaluates her life choices after receiving an invitation to her ex-boyfriend's wedding; Richard questions Bailey's loyalty, and Jo confides in Stephanie about a secret she’s been keeping from Alex.

programme.title: The Closer: Blindsided
programme.desc: In an effort to get good PR for the department, Deputy Chief Johnson takes a journalist on a ride-along. When the Crown Vic is targeted and shot at, Brenda is forced to live under 24-hour police protection, while being the key witness in a case.

programme.title: The Closer: Culture Shock
programme.desc: When a Chinese businesswoman is found dead on the tour bus she and her husband operate, Brenda and the squad must dig deep to investigate her past life. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents reveal to the squad that Brenda and Fritz are engaged.

programme.title: The Closer: Lover's Leap
programme.desc: A car belonging to a Department of Homeland Security employee is found wrecked at the bottom of Mulholland Drive. Priority Homicide is brought in to uncover the details surrounding the driver's death, but the investigation leads Brenda close to home.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: In attempting to clear up lose ends from their investigation of a gang of White Supremacists, Major Crimes detectives audit the trial of serial killer Dwight Darnell, and end up facing their most deadly case ever.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: Major Crimes continues to investigate the conspiracy behind Dwight Darnell's murders and his links to the Zyklon-Brotherhood. Sharon Raydor, disturbed by her own reactions to the case, seeks penance in the Ritual of Confession.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: Major Crimes hurtles forward towards the mysterious and elusive mastermind in the Dwight Darnell murders while Buzz and Rusty's investigation into the murder of Buzz's father comes to an unexpected end.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.desc: Racers are on edge feeling like they can't move up including Jerry Bird who thinks the list is stacked against him. Jason Cantu's plans are spoiled so he takes revenge into his own hands.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Double Standards
programme.desc: It's the second-to-last night of racing. Ryan and Murder Nova come up with a plan to get Ryan to number one. JJ and Tricia get their callouts in, but car problems threaten. Axman tries to hold onto the number one spot.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: One of the Few
programme.desc: Boosted holds a shootout for 10k in Ohio, while OKC prepares to take on Texas in a massive Cash Days showdown for $33,000.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Fairground Valuables
programme.desc: A fairground ride is revived, and Martin works on an old suitcase.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers: Saving a Quirky Counter
programme.desc: A quirky counter, a chandelier and a vintage football table are restored.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke to the Fire
programme.desc: Facing more rye and apples than the Laws can run, Josh moves his steamer still to Virginia and Tickle adds smoke to the fire. Mark and Huck help Jim Tom turn cherries into shine. Mike and Jerry risk a huge run in the barn of an unsuspecting farmer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mason Jar Shortage
programme.desc: A Mason jar shortage puts a lid on Mark and Digger's distribution plans. Mike and Jerry must return to land they've been warned off. Tim's scheme to repurpose a massive tank as an oversized pot still pushes his steam boiler to the breaking point.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caught Red-Handed
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws recruit Josh to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Digger find a solution to the jar shortage but the juice may not be worth the squeeze. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry distill vodka from surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Ice Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger invent a new recipe turning hundreds of jars of expired mandarin oranges into marketable liquor. Tickle and the Laws face headaches in their attempt to produce freeze-distilled apple liquor. Mike and Jerry make birch bark moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Another Man's Mash
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe with master distiller Richard Landry. Mark and Digger crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Basement Bust
programme.desc: Josh gains access to a cellar still site, but even help from the Laws can't keep trouble from surfacing. Mark and Digger innovate a way to cut the cost of water cooling, and bayou shiner Richard makes a medicinal moonshine from wild-grown manglier.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tennessee Whiskey
programme.desc: Mark and Digger discover a limestone source to make Tennessee Whiskey right under their feet. Just when Tim thought he was out, the Laws pulls him back in to cross state lines in search of a key ingredient. Richard turns cotton candy into moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Tons of Fun
programme.desc: Josh drives a tractor trailer full of stills across state lines to help Tickle and the Laws run two tons of malted corn. Mark and Digger christen their own secret Tennessee Whiskey distillery. Richard builds a copper Virginia-style submarine still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Capital Returns
programme.desc: Josh, Tickle and the Laws build a still farm the likes of which Virginia hasn't seen since the heyday of Amos Law. Jerry misses a day of work and Mike lets down his guard. Mark and Digger discover a rival moonshiner faces a reckoning with the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Backwoods Bonanza
programme.desc: In the season finale, with eight stills running full tilt, Tickle enlists Mrs. Tickle to stash too much shine. Mark and Digger devise a way to age their Tennessee whiskey at sea. Tim gets drawn into an epic bootleg, while Mike and Jerry face the law.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Shadows of Doubt
programme.desc: Angela contemplates divorce. Brandon and Julia attempt to fly the nest. Tiffany confronts Ronald over his parenting. Yara starts a new chapter on her own. A misstep by Andrei causes Elizabeth to panic. Natalie makes a big decision without Mike.

programme.title: You, Me & My Ex: My Ex and My Next
programme.desc: Jerry moves his new young girlfriend, Kayee, into a house he shares with his ex-wife Jessica. Lisa still isn't over her divorce from her ex Jimmy, even though it was decades ago. Alex went from Caroline's gay best friend to her boyfriend.

programme.title: You, Me & My Ex: Ex-Door Neighbors
programme.desc: April surprises her husband by getting a matching tattoo with her ex. Kayee's lack of contributions around the house frustrates Jerry's ex. Caroline is fed up when Alex's ex crashes Friendsgiving. Lisa, Jimmy and their spouses prepare for their RV trip.

programme.title: sMothered: Mother Approved: Coming Clean
programme.desc: Karla worries that she and Rykia are drifting apart. Lauren comes clean to Laura Leigh about the secret she's been keeping. Amy gets emotional when she realizes she needs space from Carina. Meanwhile, Angelica's condition worsens.

programme.title: sMothered: Losing My Best Friend
programme.desc: Lisa makes a surprising proposal to Lauren, shocking Laura Leigh. Kathy continues to insert herself at the pizzeria, but Carlo pushes back. Cher confronts Jared about staying in Florida with Belle.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Rather Die Than Pay Retail

programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find a very unusual piece of art that might leave them flush(ing). Rene and Casey enjoy a little vino.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Barry's Angels
programme.desc: Barry arrives with two auction angels that turn his frown upside down. Then, newcomers Rene and Casey buy a statue that could be worth thousands, and Darrell uncovers some feline finds.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Storage Buyer in You
programme.desc: Barry discovers bowls that have a very calming effect. And Jarrod and Brandi find some DJ equipment.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fear and Loathing in Placentia
programme.desc: The buyers head to Placentia, Calif., where Jarrod and Brandi find something that may tip the scales in their favour.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Shrining
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find their sense of charity. Barry unearths a bag that has him hitting the slopes.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Battle of the Brows

programme.title: Storage Wars: Super Bros Shuffle

programme.title: Storage Wars: Flight of the Gambler
programme.desc: Brandi learns that Jarrod is facing a problem that affects more than just their business.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Hills Have Buys
programme.desc: Rene and Casey attempt to shut out Jarrod and Brandi. Darrell dodges a bullet to score an interesting locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nerds of the Round Table
programme.desc: Ivy attempts to keep his winning streak alive, while Darrell and Rene play mind games with each other. After one ends up at a crime scene and the other takes a trip back in time, things get a little foggy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Operation: Intimidation
programme.desc: Brandi is ready to close the Long Beach store, but Jarrod is determined to save it by scoring more lockers. Ivy tries to intimidate other buyers, while Darrell gets the shock treatment.

programme.title: America's Top Dog: Young Pups and Silver Foxes
programme.desc: Furry friends tackle a massive obstacle course designed to test their mettle.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: The guys play a game of 'put-pocket' at a grocery store, then get jumpy at the park after taking each other's cell phones. Plus, tonight's biggest loser learns that when you gotta go, you gotta go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice
programme.desc: The guys get a little punchy while giving boxing lessons, then head to the mall to share the gift of music with strangers. When tonight’s loser delivers the right speech to the wrong audience, he’s the one who gets scared straight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: A Loser Presents
programme.desc: The guys return to White Castle to serve up a new round of mischief, pose as bouncers at a nightclub, and offer phony horoscope readings in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: What Did I Eat?
programme.desc: The guys try to sell diamonds to unsuspecting couples ready to tie the knot, and pose as members of a very unwelcoming committee down at the boardwalk.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: The guys share humiliating text messages in a quiet waiting room, shampoo women's hair at an upscale hair salon, and teach a driver's ed course that's a guaranteed fail.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bellydancer
programme.desc: The guys put their green thumbs to the test as workers in a garden center, demonstrate how NOT to save lives as CPR instructors, and work a deli counter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The guys host a taste test with embarrassing survey questions, haggle over priceless pieces of junk at a flea market, and tank as attendants at a gas station.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: The guys advertise incompetence to a group of agency executives, are forced into dirty deeds as custodians in a mall food court and tempt their fates by returning to the wheel of doom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joker vs. Joker
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q face off in special Joker versus Joker challenges. They try their hands at giving palm readings, manicures, and much more in a humiliating quest to avoid facing the ultimate punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: The guys lose sight of social etiquette with strangers in the park, present disastrous timeshare opportunities to future vacationers, and get sneaky with people’s pockets in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Human Pinata
programme.desc: The guys hug it out with strangers in the park, go head-to-head pitching wacky inventions to confused consumers, and launch a manhunt for their imaginary wives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Teaching an art class never looked so, bad. A dartboard and a home invasion have the contestants stressed and competitive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Jokers Playhouse
programme.desc: The guys have to keep a straight face as the other Jokers act out bizarre scenes, and then they try to get an embarrassing word in edgewise with strangers at the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: The guys bite off more than they can chew serving customers at a sub shop, and they team up at a food court to perform a mystery task based on ambiguous hints from their partner.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Puncture Perfect
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr push all the wrong buttons at a video game store, try to rope rock climbers into repeating a bizarre word, and give away fake tickets to a flop of a show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr feel the wrath of disapproving focus groups after nonsensical presentations, and try to reach out and touch strangers at the mall with anything but their hands. Plus, the guys must quit their job in front of a crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Uncomfortable
programme.desc: The guys talk ticks, tricks and antics. Plus, see the Jokers’ best bloopers and learn all about their annoying habits that aren’t captured on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Clash of the Jokers
programme.desc: In this competitive episode, Sal, Joe, Q and Murr battle head-to-head in fierce joker vs. joker challenges. The guys go two-on-two as they conduct focus groups where they focus mostly on making things uncomfortable.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe share secrets with shoppers in a grocery store, but when one shopper has a history with Murr, the embarrassment escalates to a whole new level. Then, the guys get creative in an art store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Quantum Mock-anics
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal get themselves into some hairy predicaments at the beauty supply store, then, they discover that a language barrier adds to the awkwardness during a text message challenge in Times Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fe-mail
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Jokers, although for them it's anything but relaxing. Then, at the park, Sal reveals his secret identity while discussing the birds and bees of dolphins. Plus, the big loser finds himself a little overdressed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.desc: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little role-play excursion. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash when he takes her to a comedy show, and Mitchell and Cameron play Cupid for Manny.

programme.desc: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and creepy-crawlies get the best of him. Meanwhile, Claire takes a nervous Haley to the DMV for her driver's test.

programme.title: We Got Love Teyana and Iman: Meet the Shumperts

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: Baby Got Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow has a lot to handle as he hopes to help a cancer survivor reconstruct her breasts and abdomen. A psychic who looks to remove her implants. The doctors try to reason with someone who could potentially become a plastic surgery addict.

programme.title: Botched: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who's had an implant removed three times, leaving her with one breast. Dr. Nassif assists a patient who received a surprise nose job in Peru. A UK deejay and firebreather hopes for heel implants to increase their height.

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lipo and Slippy Nippy
programme.desc: A woman with a 'side nipple' issue visits the doctors. A car accident leaves another woman's face disfigured. A previous patient comes back to the doctors, hoping to look more like a celebrity idol.

programme.title: Botched: 2,000CCs and Counting
programme.desc: A frightening surgical mishap in Colombia leaves a woman with franken-tits and the doctors salvage a man's dog bitten nose. While an Australian woman has a severe case of boob greed.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hawaii Love You So
programme.desc: Against Julie's wishes, Todd brings the family on their 20th anniversary trip to Hawaii. When Savannah and Lindsie are charged with watching Nanny Faye, they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Don't Kale Yourself
programme.desc: Lindsie challenges Todd and Julie to change their unhealthy habits. When Chase gets his wisdom teeth removed, Todd takes advantage of his altered state of mind.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Record Breaking
programme.desc: It's West Coast versus East Coast as Michelin-starred Jarad Gallagher and worldly Joshua Bedford aim to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two in the kitchen. Here to lead them to victory are celebrity chef Josh Capon and sportscaster Jaymee Sire.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Challah At Your Boy!
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Jay Pharoah plot and strategize on how to get Bobby Flay beat. Canadian chef Rene Rodriguez brings his south of the border flavors against the Italian fare of chef Michael Kramer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Knighted Sir Loin
programme.desc: Sonoma County chef Tracey Shepos Cenami and Jersey-strong John Vitale fight for the right to battle greatness. If they want to beat Bobby Flay, however, they'll have to impress the sophisticated palates of Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clamming Up
programme.desc: Indian spice master Kiran Patnam and creative chef Jonathan Wu bring big city energy to the arena. It's up to Chopped judges Amanda Freitag and Geoffrey Zakarian to decide which contender has what it takes to slay the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Making Headlines
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer of "The Today Show" is paired up with "Chopped's" Scott Conant against their friend and challenger Bobby Flay. An island battle is fought between Jamaican chef Patrick Simpson and Hawaiian chef Alvin Savella.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Had Style, They Had Food, They Were There!
programme.desc: Actress Fran Drescher joins "Chopped's" Scott Conant to beat Bobby Flay with style, food and flair. They're upping the ante by bringing in two fantastic pastry chefs, Jessica Scott and Shelby Sieg, who are ready to bake Bobby into a corner.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This'll Stick in Your Craw
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Hawaiian chef Jojo Vasquez tangles with Nashville's Brian Riggenbach for the ultimate chance to one-up Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Sunny Anderson and Clinton Kelly are here to make sure no one plays nice.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grill Me
programme.desc: "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and actor Mekhi Phifer grill Louisiana's Chef Nathan Gresham and Arizona's Chef Lisa Dahl to determine who can smoke Bobby Flay.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: A Day on the Grill
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac challenges three amateur backyard grilling wizards to make breakfast, lunch and dinner on the grill. The competitors have to handle curveballs like making a lunchtime salad trio and a stuffed entree for dinner.

programme.title: Chopped: Thrill of the Grill
programme.desc: The chefs learn that they must grill something in each round of this competition. For their appetizers, the chefs discover watermelon and wine coolers in the basket. A beautiful cut of beef and tedious-to-prep beans await the chefs.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: A Day on the Grill
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac challenges three amateur backyard grilling wizards to make breakfast, lunch and dinner on the grill. The competitors have to handle curveballs like making a lunchtime salad trio and a stuffed entree for dinner.

programme.title: Chopped: Thrill of the Grill
programme.desc: The chefs learn that they must grill something in each round of this competition. For their appetizers, the chefs discover watermelon and wine coolers in the basket. A beautiful cut of beef and tedious-to-prep beans await the chefs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This'll Stick in Your Craw
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Hawaiian chef Jojo Vasquez tangles with Nashville's Brian Riggenbach for the ultimate chance to one-up Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Sunny Anderson and Clinton Kelly are here to make sure no one plays nice.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grill Me
programme.desc: "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and actor Mekhi Phifer grill Louisiana's Chef Nathan Gresham and Arizona's Chef Lisa Dahl to determine who can smoke Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pork, Pasta and Barbecue
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checking out some tried and true local faves. In Kansas City, Mo., the neighbourhood favourite killin' it with their scratch-made standouts like pork hash with black beans.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: BFF Reunion
programme.desc: Back in her school days, Kardea would spend her weekends planning a trip to Mexico with her besties. In honor of that trip that never happened, Kardea creates a Mexican-themed meal.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: Kardea hosts a birthday dinner for her good friend Ashley. The celebratory meal starts with pepper jelly meatballs to nibble on and low country crab cakes topped with southern Succotash as the main attraction.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Fishing and Dishing
programme.desc: Kardea is meeting her brother, Kedrick, at his favourite fishing hole to hopefully catch their dinner.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Weeknight Warrior
programme.desc: Summer is in full swing and the Kitchen is preparing a week's worth of easy meals. Geoffrey makes an orecchiette with shrimp and corn while Katie Lee makes grilled chicken and kale Greek salad. Sunny shares a supermarket fix for chicken cheesesteaks.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes Made With Love
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Mother's Day with recipes made with love! Geoffrey Zakarian updates a dish from his mom's recipe box with easy Grilled Lamb Chops and Vegetable Skewers.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spice It Up!
programme.desc: The Kitchen is firing on all cylinders with spicy, flavorful recipes, including a fried chicken sandwich with gochujang glaze, chipotle carrot soup and shrimp cocktail with lemon. Plus, Chef Duff Goldman stops by to chat about his new discovery+ show.

programme.title: Chopped: Amateurs Redemption
programme.desc: It takes a very brave home cook to take on Chopped once, and these amateurs are courageous enough to come back for a second time. In the first round, vegan roast is an ingredient to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Chopped: Wild Ride
programme.desc: Fun at the carnival is the theme for this special Chopped competition. In a sign of what's to come, the chefs open the first basket to find that two out of the four ingredients are deep-fried.

programme.title: Chopped: Money Saver
programme.desc: The chefs learn that there is a 'money saver' theme for this special competition: Ingredients in each basket will not exceed $10, but the chefs' dishes are still expected to look and taste like a million bucks.

programme.title: Chopped: Viewers' Baskets
programme.desc: Fans took to social media to pick the basket ingredients in this special viewers' choice competition.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Real Handful

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Bali Is in Your Court

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Mighty Wind

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Yacht in Kneed

programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: NCIS: Faking It
programme.desc: The NCIS team is called to the scene of the murder of a petty officer who was part of an undercover arms operation. After his body is discovered, a Russian spy is pulled over for a traffic violation and is found with a recently fired gun in his car.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead and Unburied
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate when a real estate agent discovers the body of a missing lance corporal in a vacant house. At the crime scene, Gibbs discovers that the man was buried in the backyard and then exhumed.

programme.title: NCIS: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: The team investigates the attempted murder of a marine in his home and the apparent kidnapping of his daughter on Halloween. Meanwhile, Abby's Halloween costume renders McGee and Tony speechless.

programme.title: NCIS: Sandblast
programme.desc: When an explosion kills a marine colonel on a military golf course, the team must work together with the Army Criminal Investigative Unit to find the killer. A CIA tip leads them to an abandoned warehouse rigged to explode with a cellphone.

programme.title: NCIS: Once a Hero
programme.desc: The team investigates when an honoured marine veteran falls to his death at a hotel. After determining his death was not a suicide, the team discovers that he was homeless but living at the hotel with the help of a maintenance man who was a fellow vet.

programme.title: NCIS: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Forgoing NCIS procedure, McGee risks his career when he takes matters into his own hands after his sister appears at his door bloodied and confused. Meanwhile, separate clandestine romantic relationships bloom for both Abby and Tony.

programme.title: NCIS: Smoked
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when the mummified body of a man wanted for murder is found in a furnace on a marine base. Meanwhile, the NCIS team has problems with the 'fictional' book McGee wrote about a team of NCIS agents.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Love Sick
programme.desc: Rachel, a young girl from the Midwest who moved to NYC, is murdered after visiting a medical center to be treated for assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Traffic
programme.desc: The death of a magazine publisher leads detectives to a wide array of suspects, including friends, lovers and the Russian mob.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Last Rites
programme.desc: Logan's faith in the system is put to the test when a priest asks him to reinvestigate a 16-year-old triple homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Barbara Raber and Eli Weaver
programme.desc: An Amish community is turned upside down when a young wife and mother is found murdered inside her home, leading police to look deeper within the community, and exposing a secret romance that triggered a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Carmen Stonemark and James Deese
programme.desc: The disappearance of a well-respected businessman leads to an investigation that exposes a secret romance fueled by lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Carolyn King and Bradley Martin
programme.desc: A young couple becomes the target of a nation-wide manhunt after police connect the deadly lovers to two grisly murders in different states.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Mark Spotz and Christina Noland
programme.desc: A horrific killing spree leads Pennsylvania investigators on the hunt for two young lovers willing to do whatever it takes to evade the law.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kristi Koslow and Brian Salter
programme.desc: When a wealthy couple falls victim to a deadly home invasion, the search for the killers exposes both a twisted relationship and a family betrayal no one saw coming.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Alice and Gerald Uden
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearances of a young mother and her two sons in 1980 lead investigators on a three-decade quest for justice, exposing multiple murders and a homicidal love affair that left untold suffering and carnage in its wake.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: When all out war breaks out between human and ape civilizations, the ape leader struggles to deal with his darkest instincts. With a brutal Colonel leading the human forces, fate draws them together to a fight that will determine the future of the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee
programme.desc: Homer is recruited as a World Cup referee after Lisa extols his integrity on the youth soccer field in a Springfield Elementary speech contest. But when the Simpsons travel to Brazil, Homer finds his honesty tested by a gangster in the bribing business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Luca$
programme.desc: Marge is concerned that Lisa is dating below her station when she brings home competitive-eater-in-training Lucas Bortner, and she enlists Homer to help Lisa explore other options.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Days of Future Future
programme.desc: Set in the future, Homer has a new clone for every time he dies. Lisa is married to a zombie version of Milhouse, while Bart deals with custody issues with his ex-wife, Jenda. Each defines what love means to them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What to Expect When Bart's Expecting
programme.desc: Bart can't stand art class, so he makes a voodoo doll of his art teacher. But when his spell makes her pregnant instead, he becomes a saviour to Springfield couples trying to conceive. Then, he's kidnapped to help conceive a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pay Pal
programme.desc: Marge swears off befriending any more couples when Homer offends their charming new British neighbours. But when Lisa declares that she, too, doesn't need friends, Marge reconsiders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Clown in the Dumps
programme.desc: The unthinkable happens: a Springfield resident dies. Also, Krusty retires after he's offended by a comedy cable channel roast of him, and Lisa tries to protect Homer from getting hurt.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Super Franchise Me
programme.desc: Marge opens a sandwich franchise store after her sandwiches become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. But running the day-to-day at the store proves challenging, especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsorama
programme.desc: 'Futurama's' Planet Express crew comes to present-day Springfield to prevent the Simpsons from destroying the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a new teacher, Mr. Lassen, who vows to crush his spirit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Covercraft
programme.desc: Homer has a mid-life crisis, takes up bass guitar and forms a cover band with some of the other dads in town. But the band's modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of their most unlikely star, Apu.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie and Dee Find Love
programme.desc: When Charlie and Dee invade the rarefied world of the 1%, they find a romantic connection with two members of a very wealthy family.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Analyzed
programme.desc: The gang steps into the therapist's office to work through their mountain of issues. When Dennis thinks he has everyone figured out, the shrink turns the tables on him and exposes the insanity in his unique brand of pop psychology.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie's Mom Has Cancer
programme.desc: As Mac, Charlie and Dee struggle with their faith, Frank loses his memory and his mind in a quest for buried treasure, and they're all rocked by a revelation that will shake Paddy's to its very foundation.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank's Back in Business
programme.desc: With Charlie under his wing, Frank cleans up so he can get his hands dirty and help out his old company with one last big merger. An unwritten rule of the bar gets the rest of the gang caught up in a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed
programme.desc: It’s the countdown to the end of the century and the party of all parties, but pre-millennium tension is rising.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: When Ronald Reagan becomes president in 1981, his business mandate creates a new breed of entrepreneurs. See how Steve Jobs launched the Super Bowl commercial phenomenon and Ted Turner re-invented the news business by creating 24-hour news.

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: Nonstop glamour and excess find a new poster girl in the 1980s when Madonna creates her own brand inspiring young girls everywhere. Young men with money to burn buy into the yuppie lifestyle and check out the latest expensive gadget: the cell phone.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: With the motto 'greed is good,' Gordon Gekko desires excess and ambition in 'Wall Street' while traders mirror his bad behaviour in real life. CEOs see their salaries rise while women fight to overcome office boys' clubs.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: America deploys a powerful 'weapon' to hasten the fall of the Berlin Wall: pop culture. American movies, TV shows, music, and even the news, carry U.S. values and ideas out to the world and into the Soviet Bloc, swaying hearts and minds.

programme.title: '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: Relive ten years of breakneck innovation, glamour, success, and ambition all shot through fascinating trends. Includes interviews with music and film stars as well as titans of technology, business, media, and politics.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Stories
Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost Stories

programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Dragons of the Devil's Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates legends of fire-breathing dragons that hunt ships in a deadly stretch of water known as the Devil's Sea; using cutting-edge underwater science, experts reveal the truth behind these monsters of the deep.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Battle of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for MH370
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade uses recent discoveries and cutting-edge technology to investigate the whereabouts of flight MH370, and what he uncovers points to an overlooked stretch of water.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Aliens of the Abyss
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates top-secret reports of underwater alien activity, and with the help o cutting-edge science, he reveals the truth behind a close encounter between the US military and a UFO with out-of-this world technology.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Conquering Niagara
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the unlikely survival stories from people who have gone over Niagara Falls; using cutting-edge technology and the latest discoveries, experts reveal what it takes to conquer Niagara.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Confessions of a Sea Monster
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates brand-new evidence from cutting-edge scientific missions into the alleged lair of the ocean's most infamous monster, and with the help of the latest discoveries, experts uncover lurid secrets of this underwater beast.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Volcano Temple
programme.desc: The Pantheon is a 2,000-year-old temple with a dark secret; today, using cutting-edge archaeological methods and brand-new evidence, experts look beneath the streets of Rome to find out why it was built and how it survived so long.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Carpool Predator
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds a San Diego exotic wildlife park when one of its valued employees goes missing. As the search for Denise Vasseur intensifies, investigators fear that the most dangerous predator at the park is not an animal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: A young woman is swept off her feet by the man of her dreams but before they have a chance to meet, a tragic accident sends him to jail. Against the odds, they grow even closer. But when she disappears, her family begins to question his story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Searching for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Nikki McPhatter has a busy work and social life, but there's only one thing missing true love. When she doesn't show up for her usual work shift, her friends and family immediately worry -- and point to her online relationships.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Journey for Justice
programme.desc: On a deserted road in Arkansas, a man is gunned down in his car. As the case goes cold, the deceased man's daughter tries to track down the perpetrators of his murder until she finally gets a lead from another homicide thirteen years later.

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn
programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Payback
programme.desc: When these women have scores to settle, they take matters into their own hands. A traumatized woman thinks she's an avenging angel; one of Mexico's most infamous serial killers targets the elderly; and a man is butchered by two women he tries to help.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Home Protection
programme.desc: Signe Edwards is a true-blue Texan. But when an injury forces her off the saddle, she relies on a series of handymen and sketchy online acquaintances for help around the house. One of them will betray her in the most horrific way.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Lust for Death
programme.desc: Ron Hiiri is a charming ladies' man, living the good life in upscale Connecticut. But along with the presence of an alluring new girlfriend and a mysterious stockbroker, comes a mix of financial and romantic entanglements that proves to be deadly.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in Coronado
programme.desc: A young boy suffers a fatal fall at his father's home. Two days later, the father's girlfriend is found hanging from a rope off a balcony. Two mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A serial killer stalks Orange County, CA, targeting the homeless. Meanwhile, a young man stands accused of murdering his family. Investigators must race to find the crucial link between the cases.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Axe to Grind
programme.desc: Lancaster, Texas is rocked by the brutal triple murder of Donna Jester, her mother Dalpha, and boarder Laura Owen. Donna's diary describes her penchant for picking up hitchhikers, one of whom just may be responsible for this heinous crime.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control

programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: For home restoration expert Tamara Day, there's no such thing as a home that's too big! She specializes in restoring the neglected large homes that others are too scared to take on. She brings these beauties back to life for new families to love.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bold In, Old Out
programme.desc: Tamara uses her design expertise to modernize an outdated, 1970s Tudor home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaintop Retreat
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Eagle Rock, Virginia, to build a spectacular dogtrot cabin in the Blue Ridge Mountains. Tim Rose travels to Halifax, Virginia, to see the finished log cabin they built five years earlier at the Springfield Distillery.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Million Little Things
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a million things to do on the Boneyard. As they prep two cabins and complete an endless list of tasks, Sherman works with blacksmith Glen Bryant to create a branding iron, and Mark Bowe visits one of the first cabins he built.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Kentucky Home
programme.desc: The crew visits Johnny Jett's hometown of Morehead, KY, to save an old barn, and Mark challenges the two junior members of the team to take down a few logs. Johnny takes the guys to see an old grist mill that's close to his favourite covered bridge.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Five-Barn Farm
programme.desc: The guys salvage five tobacco barns on one farm in Alton, Virginia, while Mark hunts for even more barns in Pennsylvania. Mark also visits an incredible finished home made of two cabins combined with a salt box addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Out of this World
programme.desc: Down in Virginia, the Barnwood Builders recreate an 18th-century log chapel and save an old barn using modern equipment that looks like it came from outer space. They build a bench with a chainsaw artist, and Johnny Jett learns to play golf.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bowl O' Bayou
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown sheds light on Cajun and Creole, and comes up with a method for making a brick roux and the perfect gumbo.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ginger: Rise of the Rhizome
programme.desc: When a fairy tale figure seeks host Alton Brown's help in spicing up his personality, it leads to the exploration of that zesty rhizome ginger.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Peanut Gallery
programme.desc: Alton Brown turns a handful of peanuts into some seriously delectable treats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Detroit
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Motor City to grab a slice of Detroit-style pizza, line up for a Coney Island dog and chili fries, fill up on timeless Middle Eastern classics and dine at a Detroit institution in the making.

programme.desc: Andrew heads to Orlando, Florida, to discover the incredible rich food scene that's often left in the shadow of Disney World.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.desc: Andrew celebrates the can't-miss local favorites of Cincinnati, including pork schnitzel, goetta and Cincinnati chili.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: I'm Stuffed
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes on a spectacular journey of some super stuffed foods. Find out if bao are good enough to save our necks, if toasted ravioli are a big stuffed lie and whether knishes could once land you in jail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dishes In Disguise
programme.desc: All is not what it seems as Michael McKean reveals the truth behind dishes in disguise. He uncovers what it took to make turducken tick, and how it takes more than magic to get soup inside soup dumplings.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Santa's Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean takes us on a satisfying sleigh ride to find out if Yule log cakes can keep evil at bay, and if panettone was actually created by a Tony.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.desc: Alton Brown demonstrates how to grind your own grains and turn a handful of hulls into a meal.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme

programme.title: Bluey: See Saw/ Movies/ Grandad

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson's investigation into a famous Hollywood divorce attorney found floating in his swimming pool is under heavy scrutiny. Meanwhile, Fritz and Brenda are trying to consolidate their bills, but Brenda discovers a secret.

programme.title: The Closer: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Under intense pressure, Brenda has forty-eight hours to break a new witness' alibi and get her case back on track. Meanwhile, Brenda's relationship with Fritz is in danger as secrets loom.

programme.title: The Closer: Next of Kin
programme.desc: Brenda finds herself transporting a robbery suspect in a recreational vehicle driven by her parents.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
