programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Live Punishment Special

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bellydancer
programme.desc: The guys put their green thumbs to the test as workers in a garden center, demonstrate how NOT to save lives as CPR instructors, and work a deli counter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Charity Case
programme.desc: The guys go barking up the wrong tree at a pet store, take a swing as golf instructors, and give their regards to Broadway as producers in need of funding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Theater del Absurdo
programme.desc: The guys raise money for absurd charities at a donut shop, join diners mid-meal in a Chinese restaurant, and offer unsolicited advice to shoppers in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: The guys try to smooch strangers on the streets of Manhattan, play a word game with unsuspecting shoppers, and try not to be camera shy when they're forced to pose as photographers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Film Fail
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr are forced to think on their feet at a podiatrist’s office, ask strangers for help burying unusual items in the park, and keep their eyes on the prize in a grocery store race.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr strike out with patrons in a bowling alley and try to force-feed unsuspecting diners. Plus, a surprise visit by Rosie O’Donnell has tonight’s loser seeing double.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: The guys force each other to do absurd tasks at a music store, and try to get a compliment on some not-so stylish outfits.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: The guys blindly follow each other's humiliating directions at a water park, compete to sell their ridiculous book ideas, and try to convince unknowing strangers to save their seats in Time Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q network their way into some very uncomfortable business conversations, and go head to head in a photography presentation that's anything but picture perfect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Permanent Punishment
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Sal, and Joe provide a false sense of security to some sassy shoppers at a drug store, and the competition reaches new heights during a rematch of their balloon challenge in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Parks and Wreck!
programme.desc: The guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter and convince strangers to press send on their absurd e-mails. The loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Just Say No
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the casino to see if they can play their cards right as blackjack dealers. Then they team up for a complex guessing game in the park and polish strangers' footwear to an imperfect shine. The loser takes a pounding.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: B-I-N-G-N-O
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr ham it up behind the counter of a famous NYC deli and head to Union Square where they break the ice with bizarre behaviour while selling popsicles. The loser wishes Bingo wasn't his name-o in a humiliating punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother-in-Loss
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal are forced to get cheeky with interviewers and explain their lack-luster resumes while trying to land a job at a mobile company. The loser witnesses a joining in matrimony that's anything but holy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Big Uneasy
programme.desc: The guys take over New Orleans, as they steal sips from strangers' drinks at a famous bar, spin the Wheel of Voo-Doom on Bourbon Street, and crash some horse and buggy rides. Then, tonight's loser turns into a legendary swamp monster.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hopeless and Changeless
programme.desc: The guys head to the park asking strangers to agree with their bizarre points of view, then give classless lessons about real estate. Plus, tonight's loser finds himself in a harrowing race to the finish at the racetrack.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlour, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.desc: Todd sets an appointment for Julie's colonoscopy but runs into trouble when she forces him to get one too. Faye's gambling gets out of hand, and Lindsie takes drastic measures to get her to quit.

programme.desc: Lindsie sets up a lunch for Todd and Will so they can work out their differences. Meanwhile Savannah gives Grayson dating advice.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Message in a Bottle Rocket
programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Around

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pretty in Print

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Out With the Old, In With the New

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair
programme.desc: Kanye invites the entire family to NYC for his fashion show, but Khloé is torn over whether Lamar can handle such a big first appearance since his accident. Meanwhile, Kim tries to keep Scott busy in NYC, and Lamar meet Caitlyn for the first time.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fake It Til You Make It

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashian Curse

programme.desc: When a ruthless sultan threatens the lives of his wife and son, a young prince is willing to go to great lengths to keep them safe. An encounter in a cave, high up in the mountain, turns him into the legendary vampire, Dracula.

programme.title: Movie: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is hired to defend a small town from a deadly industrialist and his army. He recruits six other gunslingers to help him against superior technology. Meeting the townspeople, the Seven find themselves fighting for more than just money.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: The Decepticons attempt to recover glyphs imprinted in Sam Witwicky's brain. With the information, comes the location of an ancient weapon that can be used to destroy the sun. The Autobots and Optimus Prime have to stop them at all cost.

programme.title: Movie: Seven
programme.desc: Detectives pursue a serial killer whose crimes embody the Bible's seven deadly sins.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld
programme.desc: A vampire warrior finds herself falling in love with a human who has been bitten by a werewolf, the sworn enemies of her clan.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
programme.desc: A condemned Confederate prisoner is due to be hanged by Union troops.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Queen of the Nile
programme.desc: A reporter visits an ageless movie queen to discover how she manages to stay so beautiful.

programme.title: Futurama: Reincarnation
programme.desc: Futurama is reconceived in three alternate animation styles.

programme.title: Futurama: The Bots and the Bees
programme.desc: Bender and the office soda machine conceive a mini bot.

programme.title: Futurama: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: A prophet predicts 3012 will be the end of the world.

programme.title: Futurama: Decision 3012
programme.desc: Leela becomes a campaign manager for a presidential candidate whose birth certificate is missing.

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: Movie: Shut In
programme.desc: After a horrific accident kills her husband and paralyzes her son, a child psychologist takes a young boy, dealing with the loss of his mother, into her home. When he disappears in a winter storm, she confronts ghosts and deadly visions to find him.

programme.title: Movie: Dracula Untold

programme.title: Movie: Seven
programme.desc: Detectives pursue a serial killer whose crimes embody the Bible's seven deadly sins.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm
programme.desc: Despite its odd layout and decrepit state, Mina and Karen are taking on an old house with a ton of historic charm in the Old Southside neighborhood. As framing starts, the crew uncovers a major structural problem that hits the budget hard.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Condo Brings Family Together
programme.desc: Mina and Karen work to gut a condo and make it a dream home for Mina's sister and her two girls. The remodel includes personalized touches, including a special mural made by Mina, Karen and the kids.

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-Busting Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a home near the Northside neighborhood that's full of historical features. They work on an open floor plan, but structural slow-downs and permitting nightmares threaten their schedule and budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Down to the Studs: Chelsea Vibes in Old Southside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are in Old Southside, but this time they're working in a transitional area. They've purchased a duplex of townhomes that will need both sides renovated, but for now they're focusing on the left side.

programme.title: Good Bones: Scary to Chic in Old Southside
programme.desc: With her son in tow and another baby on the way, Mina returns to Old Southside where she and Karen aim to turn a creepy, insect-infested lot into a chic oasis for a new family. Along the way, they make a sentimental connection to the home's past owner.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Time Warp Reno
programme.desc: From a batting cage basement to a main bedroom suite stuck in the '80s, this family's home has problems on literally every level. Tiffany is ready to get this house in line, but a slew of unforeseen hiccups immediately starts to eat away at their budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: Best Friends Forever in Miami
programme.desc: A single mother looks to purchase a wealth-building home for her and her daughter in Miami, Florida. She's looking for a ranch-style house and doesn't mind a fixer-upper, but her unwillingness to bend on price may prove to be unrealistic.

programme.title: House Hunters: Sports, Beaches and LA Dreams
programme.desc: A young family looking to move from Florida to California is searching for the perfect home in the tight Los Angeles market, but their conflicting location and size needs could quickly derail their California dream.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Traveling Solo to Madrid
programme.desc: A newly divorced woman looks to challenge herself and seeks adventure in Madrid, Spain. She's looking for a traditional Spanish neighborhood with easy access to public transportation, but on her budget, there will need to be some compromises.

programme.title: Good Bones: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Mina and Karen find that "you get what you pay for" when they buy a bargain house for $5,000.

programme.title: Good Bones: New House, Old Spirit
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture just east of downtown Indy to take on a two-storey, worn-down home that's as risky as it is disgusting. The house has almost no sustainable foundation, so the ladies try to rebuild from the ground up while adding features.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Got Bored and Bought a Farm
programme.desc: Jon Knight must preserve the history of a 280-year-old farmhouse while also making it feasible for modern living. When he learns that part of the foundation is beyond saving, he makes the shocking proposition to the owners to tear down half of the home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Third Generation Renovation
programme.desc: A historical house from 1873 is transformed into a vibrant, modern home for a young family. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin give this family of five a home with fun colors, shiny brass, whimsical bird wallpaper and even a beehive.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Bakeshop Kitchen
programme.desc: It's a sugary sweet renovation when Jon Knight and his team tackle a baker's 1910 home. Together, Jon and Kristina Crestin give her a charming, retro kitchen that any baker would love and a luxurious main suite the single mom truly deserves.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: The Horse Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina take on their biggest renovation when they make over a couple's horse farm. They're tasked with combining all their clients' requests - an old-world kitchen, a moody club room and a country club exterior - into a single, cohesive home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Farmhouse for a Chef
programme.desc: An outdated farmhouse is transformed into a functional family home with an earthy design. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin create a kitchen fit for a chef, a cozy, traditional New England family room and even a goat jungle gym for their new farm animals.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Coastal Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin have their biggest budget yet to overhaul an old family home while honouring three generations of memories. They give this family a breezy, coastal home full of sentimental touches and nods to their farming history.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Day Care Redo
programme.desc: A woman that operates a day care out of her house is having trouble selling since buyers can't visualize her business as a family home. Lyndsay and Leslie transition the commercial space back into a cozy residence with a vintage farmhouse style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Renewed Ocean Views
programme.desc: A woman is overwhelmed with trying to sell her mom's underwhelming condo. Lyndsay and Leslie step in to reinvent condo living by remodeling the space for mature buyers with a modern Mediterranean design that showcases its stunning ocean view.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rental Reno

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: A Contemporary Cleanup

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Keeping the Character

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: De'Asia Page and Jared Kemp
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother falls victim to a brutal crime, the search for her killers reveals a torrid romance between two young lovers willing to do anything to get what they desire.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery
programme.desc: She was a beaming bride. It was a haunting death. Sarah and Ryan were newlyweds when she drowned in the bathtub. Did she die of natural causes or was it deliberate? It took three trials to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Justice for Bonnie
programme.desc: When Bonnie Craig was found dead, police collected DNA but it didn't match anyone in the system. Then, twelve years later, there was a hit but the man was thousands of miles away. Turns out, prosecutors would need more than DNA to convict a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Debbie Hawk
programme.desc: When Debbie Hawk vanished, her friends and family were left searching for answers. Investigators discovered that before she went missing, Debbie planned to reveal secrets. Police wondered if silencing her was a motive for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Against All Odds
programme.desc: It was a crime not even police could believe: A toddler was shot in the head and left for dead. Despite the odds, she stunned everyone with her will to survive while a detective vowed to crack this case, no matter how long it took.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Smokey Mountain Murders
programme.desc: It's quitting time in the Smokey Mountains of Tennessee and a group of fellas bellies up to a local bar. But when moods shift, someone will wind up dead. And when another local mysteriously goes missing, neighbors fear a killer is hiding among them.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea
programme.desc: When a celebration starts to sour, tempers flare and someone vanishes. Days later, a body is discovered in an unsavory part of a Northern California town. When the case goes cold, it will take a most unexpected plea to finally catch a killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rogers
programme.desc: In this bizarre mid-western saga, a grudge between a shady District Attorney and an eccentric local student turns deadly. Dogged investigators work for decades to bring a quartet of brothers to justice.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Suhs
programme.desc: An immigrant family's American dream turns into a nightmare when a devious sister manipulates her younger valedictorian brother into committing murder. When a dark family secret comes to light, it tears the siblings apart.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Fryers
programme.desc: In one of the most tragic and brutal crimes in the history of the Great Plains, five teens playing by a campfire are ambushed when a trio of shotgun-wielding brothers targets them. A lone survivor bravely helps detectives hunt down her assailants.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Hawes
programme.desc: A missing persons case spirals down a winding path once detectives learn that a formerly beloved older brother appears to have embezzled money from their family's business. His siblings are hell-bent on getting revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Monique Kitts
programme.desc: A successful daycare owner finds her husband dead after an alleged home invasion, but police discover a shocking double life and a murder plan full of possible accomplices.

programme.title: Snapped: Ajelina Lewis
programme.desc: A young father is murdered; suspicion turns to his child’s mother.

programme.title: Movie: Pacific Rim Uprising
programme.desc: Several years after humanity's victory, the children of a fallen hero pilot massive robots to fight monsters from another world when one of their own goes rogue and reopens the rift to the monsters' home world, threatening humanity with extinction.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's New Friend
programme.desc: Bart has a new accomplice and best friend when Homer is hypnotized at the circus and believes he is a young boy again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Musk Who Fell to Earth
programme.desc: When inventor Elon Musk lands in Springfield, he and Homer become fast friends and revolutionize the town's nuclear plant. But when Musk goes overboard and Mr. Burns wants him removed, Homer must figure out a way to break up with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Walking Big and Tall
programme.desc: When Lisa learns Springfield's anthem was stolen from another town she writes a replacement. Meanwhile, Homer learns the meaning of 'Wide Pride.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Princess Guide
programme.desc: Homer is put in charge of keeping Princess Kemi out of trouble while her father, a Nigerian king, works out a uranium deal with Mr. Burns. When Kemi ends up at Moe's, Moe jumps to the conclusion she's related to the prince who scammed him via e-mail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sky Police
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum is mistakenly delivered a military jet pack, which he gleefully accepts and uses in order to fight crime. But when the jet pack crashes into the church, the congregation resorts to gambling to collect money for the repairs.

programme.title: Family Guy: Better Off Meg
programme.desc: When Meg is erroneously reported to have died in a car crash, she goes along with the story to start a new life elsewhere. Meanwhile, the Griffins experience a life without Meg.

programme.title: Family Guy: Holly Bibble
programme.desc: Cooped up in a hotel room due to a big storm, the Griffins pass the time by reimagining three stories from the Bible.

programme.title: Family Guy: Movin' in (Principal Shepherd's Song)
programme.desc: Principal Shepherd moves in with the Griffins after he is fired for fat-shaming Chris at school. Meanwhile, Brian sues Stewie for writing a series of children's books which portray him as an idiot.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Just One of the Boyz 4 Now for Now

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Taking of Funtime One Two Three
programme.desc: Desperate for the grand prize dune buggy at their local arcade, Louise, Tina and Gene devise a master plan, with the help of Mr. Fischoeder. Meanwhile, Teddy manages to convince Bob and Linda to take in a chicken by promising fresh eggs.

programme.title: Archer: Legs
programme.desc: Archer's fear of cyborgs hits home when Krieger offers to make robotic legs for Gillette.

programme.title: Archer: Midnight Ron
programme.desc: The beginning of beautiful hatred between Archer and his new stepfather plays out as the two are chased by gangsters.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Rules the World
programme.desc: After slipping into an unhealthy obsession with computer games, the gang wrestles to define the difference between the real and the virtual worlds.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Dines Out
programme.desc: When Mac and Dennis' private dinner is interrupted by an unexpected sighting of Frank and Charlie, the in-fighting begins.

programme.desc: The Dr. Pol Veterinary team is finally getting some relief from their busy schedules in the form of a recent vet school graduate named Dr. Sandra.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: A Pig and His Pooch
programme.desc: A mini-horse befriends a dog, rhinos and sheep form an unbreakable bond, and a pig cuddles up to his best canine pal.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: Puppy Want a Parrot?
programme.desc: Heart-warming stories of animal friends.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: Modern Family
programme.desc: Witness heartwarming stories of unbreakable bonds formed between unlikely animal friends.

programme.title: Unlikely Animal Friends: Duck, Duck, Cat!
programme.desc: A goat that's best friends with a pig; a dog that loves riding on the back of a miniature horse; a woman who helped save an Alaskan bald eagle and outfit it with a prosthetic beak; a playful ferret and dog; a former military working dog and his Marine.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: Egypt's Greatest Pharaohs
programme.desc: The ancient Egyptian cities of Thebes and Abydos are home to the Valley of the Kings and some of the oldest tombs ever discovered; now, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets behind Egypt's greatest pharaohs.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Prophets
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Prophets
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Prophets
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Cult Kings
programme.desc: The ancient city of Abydos contains some of the oldest Egyptian tombs and a buried temple linked to a mysterious death cult. Now, archaeologists use cutting-edge drone imaging to investigate long-hidden secrets behind the first pharaohs.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aztec Alien Mystery
programme.desc: When satellite images reveal spot a strange white substance in the land of the Aztecs, experts investigate the site for extraterrestrial connections; what they find could explain the rise of one of the world's greatest civilizations.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn't save his life. It's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to follow the bloody trail of clues and piece together the victim's last moments.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day 2018, in the mountains of Colorado a young pilot goes missing without a trace, leaving behind her baby. Police follow the few clues they have and unravel a story far more bizarre and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: A look back at crime cases where questions remain unanswered.

programme.title: Body Cam: Seconds from Death
programme.desc: An armed robber starts a deadly shootout on a city bus in Maryland. A California police officer races to drag a man from a wheelchair stuck on a train level crossing. In Ohio, police officers attempt to rescue a woman trapped inside a raging house fire.

programme.title: Body Cam: Taken
programme.desc: In Colorado, an unpredictable armed ex-convict takes his family hostage and threatens to kill them and himself. In Florida, a gas station robbery leads to a life-threatening attack on a police officer and a night-time manhunt in the woods.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: A look back at crime cases where questions remain unanswered.

programme.title: Body Cam: Seconds from Death
programme.desc: An armed robber starts a deadly shootout on a city bus in Maryland. A California police officer races to drag a man from a wheelchair stuck on a train level crossing. In Ohio, police officers attempt to rescue a woman trapped inside a raging house fire.

programme.title: Body Cam: Taken
programme.desc: In Colorado, an unpredictable armed ex-convict takes his family hostage and threatens to kill them and himself. In Florida, a gas station robbery leads to a life-threatening attack on a police officer and a night-time manhunt in the woods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Down the Canal
programme.desc: In Fresno, CA the body of Jody Lynn Wolfe washes up along the banks of Dry Creek Canal. Detectives can't imagine who could do this to the young teen. But the more they learn about Jody's life, the more they begin to realize this murder hits close to home.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: In Too Deep
programme.desc: A submerged car pulled from a Florida canal brings a startling discovery: the body of 39-year-old Beverly Jackson. Police explore the single mom's work route and relationships, but it will take the help of a hotline tipster to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Nightmare in Northport
programme.desc: Narleen Campton was found viciously beaten to death in her own home after she didn't contact her daughter Sabrina on Thanksgiving. Who would want to murder the 62-year-old grandmother? The investigation unravels a murky world of drugs and violence.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: Wisconsin police are shocked in 2010 to find an elderly couple brutally murdered in their home. When family and neighbors start receiving death threats, police fear the killer isn't done. Can they solve the case before they strike again?

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Passenger
programme.desc: A 911 dispatcher is found slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked sedan with a bullet through his torso. To catch the killer, Demery must retrace the victim's final steps and untangle a web of accusation and innuendo spun by a shady cast of characters.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Blood Money
programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shockwaves of fear through their normally quiet community. Clues are scarce, until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Out of Reach
programme.desc: The prime suspect in the murder of an American teacher while living in Seoul, South Korea, in 1988 speaks publicly about the case for the first time in 30 years.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: The Cocoon
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing, children find her body disposed of in a rural community miles away. Forensic experts decipher surprising animal hair fibers and DNA evidence, which puts detectives on the trail of an enraged predator.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: The homicide of William Young has gone cold but not for Det. Joe Rasco. After more than a decade, he'll track down every player again to provide the answers to get justice once and for all for William and his family.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Lost Highway
programme.desc: 22-year-old mom Shawn Williams heads to the store late one night and never comes home. When her body is found the following day along an Oklahoma river, investigators wonder if one of the men in Shawn's life might be her killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: A recent law graduate goes missing weeks before the bar exam. Family, friends and investigators collaborate to uncover the mystery of where she went, and who put her there. A revelation puts her inner circle under suspicion until the killer is revealed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mud Men
programme.desc: Matteo Lundgren is taking the art of natural building to a whole new level with his custom-designed Cob houses that blend with the environment surrounding them.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Carpenters Hall
programme.desc: The crew stays local and heads just down the street in Roanoke where they salvage a one-of-a-kind sign and pick through an old meeting hall. Later, Mike and Tay build a TV console out of old material.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Crumbling 1740s Structure
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by Steve and his son Ellis to take on the original 1740s section of their home in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1790 Three-Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff meets Allen and Kathleen, a couple who wants him to restore three rooms in the original portion of their 1790 home. Jeff and his team dig into each space, uncovering a few unique original details and adding other historic features.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1798 Living Room Switch
programme.desc: A couple with a home built in 1798 enlists Jeff to transform their original living room into a dining room to fit their growing family. Then, Jeff and the crew uncover an amazing surprise while stripping down an original wood mantel.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Overhaul
programme.desc: Jeff is challenged to bring out the history in an 1802 farmhouse that has had a number of questionable renovations throughout its 200 years. His clients want original stone and ceiling beams in the dining room and an overhaul of the fireplace.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1750s Inn Revival
programme.desc: A couple that's in over their heads with their home that was once a historic inn calls on Jeff to turn two rooms into a tavern-like entertaining space. The team quickly find issues when they uncover the fireplace and try to install an exposed beam.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Red-Hot Roasts
programme.desc: Roger visits two caterers in the South who specialize in live-fire cookouts. He starts in Chattanooga, Tennessee where Argentinian grill master Mariano Cebrián has an incredible collection of portable rigs to create fantastical live-fire events.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Owned by a mother and son, Curry Corner has been a Phoenix staple for nearly 10 years. Todd Graves is on site to help, with special guests Rob Schneider and football player DeAndre Hopkins.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Family and Business on the Brink
programme.desc: Todd Graves travels to New Orleans to visit Domilise's Po-Boy and Bar, a family restaurant operating for over a century. NFL star Michael Thomas and football legend Archie Manning join Todd, along with musical group Rebirth Brass Band.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Lover's Madness
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to his hometown of Cleveland to visit a brewery that revolutionizes classic pub fare with decadent confit chicken wings in chipotle-maple glaze.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Flavors Of Cincinnati
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Cincinnati for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mo-Town, Mo-Food

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Maine
programme.desc: Tony heads to Maine to discover its local food and culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Andrew explores Santa Fe, NM, a town intent on preserving its culture. Native American, Spanish and Mexican traditions converge to form mouthwatering dishes like slow-roasted carne adovada and light-as-air sopapillas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Twin Cities
programme.desc: Walleye, bundt cake, and the Jucy Lucy are on tap for Andrew in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.
