programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House: Can't Hardly Wait/A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job, but it's harder than she expected. When a classmate mocks about Charles, Lana decides to train him for a dog show.

programme.title: The Loud House: For Bros About to Rock/ It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: Power Play With the Casagrandes/ Room for Improvement With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage. Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutty Nieces/ Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's three nieces. SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Off to See the Wizard
programme.desc: Brendar and Evan travel to Horus’ castle, where the wizard hires her to defeat the evil witch who turned his daughter into an owl. Brendar chooses Axe as her payment, while Evan has to prove he’s worthy of going with the group on the quest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Fancy/ Krabby Road
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward redecorate his house. / Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Plankton schemes to steal the Krabby patty by disguising himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Flock Collecting/ Bye Bye Booty
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce get into the hobby of rock collecting, only to discover that they are the ones being collected. Buhdeuce attempts to get his butt back after it detaches itself because of overuse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go/ Chum FRICASSee
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then-the world! Hahahahahaha!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: The Loud House: For Bros About to Rock/ It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: Store Wars With the Casagrandes/ Lucha Fever With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mom and Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that his mom and dad had every super power imaginable.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Knights/ Snake Charmer
programme.desc: Theodore hopes to be a knight and comically struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Quarantined
programme.desc: Bree is exposed to a dangerous toxic chemical, sending Adam and Chase on a mission for an antidote. Bree escapes quarantine and when her side effects kick in it's up to Leo to get her back to her capsule.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Rats Strike Back
programme.desc: The Lab Rats confide in Leo their frustrations at having to constantly train and their desire to do normal teenage things. Leo explains the concept of going on strike so they face off against Davenport, who calls their strike bluff and raises the stakes.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Parallel Universe
programme.desc: Leo is inadvertently sucked into Davenport's new invention and transported into a parallel universe where Tasha is a brilliant inventor, Davenport is her insecure assistant, and Leo finally has bionic abilities.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Whatever Gets You Through the Night
programme.desc: Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Totally Awesome Battle Jack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mommy Can You Hear Me?/ Road Trip
programme.desc: After Candace injures her ankle and is told to stay in bed, Phineas and Ferb provide her with a box of items to stave off her boredom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Skiddley Whiffers/ Tour de Ferb
programme.desc: The boys build a giant version of a childhood game, using Danville as the central location. Candace ends up playing along with them so that she can carry on her title of 'Skiddley Whiffers Queen.' Doofenshmirtz tries to deal with Vanessa growing up.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Movie: Day of the Dead 2: Contagium
programme.desc: A barely contained 'zombie' bacteriological weapon from 1968 is re-released at a hospital.

programme.desc: Ancient flying reptiles attack Los Angeles.
